finding_results.notes: The reveal now gives Owen one concrete read on amendment magic as condition-level permission work, frames the sphere as a planetary-scale concealment problem, and keeps the largest inference unresolved by leaving open what exactly the Meridian Commonwealth hid.

The reading sequence now keeps the crawlspace active on the page through Owen's posture, cramping, burn surges, failing wandlight, and renewed curfew threat instead of running as uninterrupted abstract interpretation.

summary: Revised the Grinlow Leaves discovery so the chapter keeps bodily and tactical pressure inside the reveal, lands amendment magic as permission-level work, and leaves the planetary concealment inference explicitly provisional.
